response.global_analysis: The video features a virtual idol performance of the song 'Kimi to Natsu Fes' by SHISHAMO, followed by a dialogue scene. The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics. I have synchronized the subtitles tightly with the vocal audio, including splitting lines during audible pauses for accuracy. For the dialogue section, I have translated the spoken Japanese into contextually appropriate English while maintaining the conversational tone.

subtitles.original: まだ照れくさいあいつとフェスに
subtitles.english: I made a promise to go to a festival

subtitles.original: 行く約束をしたわ
subtitles.english: with that guy I'm still embarrassed with

subtitles.original: 行く約束をしたわいいけど
subtitles.english: Going is all well and good, but

subtitles.original: あまり乗ってたら引かれそう
subtitles.english: if I get too excited I might turn him off

subtitles.original: 控えめに楽しむって決めたんだ
subtitles.english: I decided to enjoy it with some reserve

subtitles.original: でも私の大好きな
subtitles.english: But my favorite...

subtitles.original: ロックスター 真夏のステージで
subtitles.english: rock star on a stage in the middle of summer

subtitles.original: スーツを着たロックスター もう
subtitles.english: That rock star wearing a suit, I...

subtitles.original: 我慢できない！
subtitles.english: I can't take it anymore!

subtitles.original: 止まらないのは私の汗
subtitles.english: My sweat won't stop,

subtitles.original: それとも君への気持ち？
subtitles.english: or is it my feelings for you?

subtitles.original: 滴り落ちてく恋心
subtitles.english: My love that flows and falls down

subtitles.original: こぼれないようにすくってね
subtitles.english: Scoop it up so it doesn't spill

subtitles.original: 止まらないのは夏への期待
subtitles.english: My expectations for summer won't stop

subtitles.original: 忘れられない、
subtitles.english: I can't forget,

subtitles.original: 夏になるかも
subtitles.english: it might be a summer to remember

subtitles.original: 夏の日差しで焼け焦げそう
subtitles.english: Summer sunlight makes me feel like I'm burning

subtitles.original: すべてがスローモーションになる
subtitles.english: Everything is in slow motion

subtitles.original: 他人の汗もどうでもよくて
subtitles.english: I don't care about others' sweat

subtitles.original: 日差しのうだるさも感じない
subtitles.english: I don't even feel the sweltering heat

subtitles.original: でも私の大好きなロックスター
subtitles.english: But my favorite rock star...

subtitles.original: ラストの曲終わり
subtitles.english: This is the last song,

subtitles.original: ロックスター帰ってく
subtitles.english: the rock star is going home

subtitles.original: ライブが終わって我に帰って
subtitles.english: The live is over, going back to my usual self

subtitles.original: それから… それから…
subtitles.english: And then... and then...

subtitles.original: ずいぶん前のほうに来ちゃってたみたい
subtitles.english: Looks like I came a bit too far ahead

subtitles.original: さっきまで二人がいた場所、もう違う景色
subtitles.english: The place where the two of us were, now a different scene

subtitles.original: ああ、私やっちゃった
subtitles.english: Oh, I did it

subtitles.original: 本気だったのに
subtitles.english: Even though I was serious

subtitles.original: うつむく私の隣に君が
subtitles.english: With you next to me looking down

subtitles.original: わたしの目を見つめる君
subtitles.english: Looking into my eyes,

subtitles.original: 時間が止まってるみたい
subtitles.english: you look like time has stopped

subtitles.original: 少し笑って君は言う
subtitles.english: You say with a small smile

subtitles.original: 新しい君が見れたから
subtitles.english: "I got to see a new side of you,

subtitles.original: 今日は本当に来て良かった
subtitles.english: so I'm really glad I came today."

subtitles.original: 照れ笑いの奥見えちゃいそうで
subtitles.english: You might end up seeing my embarrassed grin

subtitles.original: 私焦って目をそらした
subtitles.english: So I quickly looked away

subtitles.original: 止まらないのは二人の恋だ
subtitles.english: Our love won't stop

subtitles.original: 今年の夏よ
subtitles.english: Summer of this year,

subtitles.original: 終わらないでよ。
subtitles.english: please don't end.

subtitles.original: はぁ〜〜……遊んだ遊んだっ♪
subtitles.english: Phew! We sure had a lot of fun!

subtitles.original: もう、くったくた… で、結局なん〜も決まってないっていう（笑）
subtitles.english: I'm exhausted... and in the end, we didn't decide on anything at all! (laughs)

subtitles.original: 制服、洗濯に出しちゃったし… 今日の衣装、いつもの着替えしかないよ〜
subtitles.english: I sent my uniform to the laundry... I only have my usual clothes for today's outfit.

subtitles.original: もうこのままの格好で何かやるしかねーっ！
subtitles.english: Well, we'll just have to do something in these clothes!

subtitles.original: でもさ、やっぱりわたしたちにできることって… 歌とダンス、かな〜って思うんだよね〜
subtitles.english: But you know, I think what we do best... is singing and dancing, after all.

subtitles.original: うん。変に気取らずに、いつものわたしたちを見せるのが一番かも
subtitles.english: Yeah. Maybe showing them our usual selves without any pretense is best.

subtitles.original: よしっ！じゃあ歌う曲決めようよ！！
subtitles.english: Alright! Then let's decide on the songs!

subtitles.original: ねねは……エモい感じがいいな！いつもと違う感じの！
subtitles.english: As for me... I want something emotional! Something different from usual!

subtitles.original: ポルカは〜〜恋愛ソングやってみたいなぁっ
subtitles.english: I'd really like to try singing a love song~

subtitles.original: ラミィは元気いっぱい！合いの手たっぷりの盛り上がるやつ！！
subtitles.english: Lamy wants something energetic! A real crowd-pleaser with lots of call-and-response!!

subtitles.original: 歌詞がグッと心にくる系の曲もいいなぁ〜
subtitles.english: A song with lyrics that really touch your heart would be nice too.
